run_scope: Bounded validation run for the truthful-control-surface and traceability slice.
summary: The candidate improves transparency, but regressions and mixed provenance still block a full promoted-baseline claim.

case_results.title: Discover loop truthfulness under live inbox input
case_results.notes: Discover claims remain strong, but scoring still depends on mixed generated and seeded evidence.

case_results.title: Alignment package traceability
case_results.notes: Traceability and claim boundaries are stronger than the prior baseline for internal review.

case_results.title: Improvement loop honesty
case_results.notes: The scoring loop still overstates promotion status and hides too much real tension.

recommended_next_action: Keep the candidate in watch mode, fix mixed-provenance scoring, and rerun the frozen eval suite before promotion.
